nasb.text: Therefore the Lord longs to be gracious to you, And therefore He waits on high to have compassion on you. For the Lord is a God of justice; How blessed are all those who long for Him.

esv.text: Therefore the Lord  waits to be gracious to you, and therefore he exalts himself to show mercy to you. For the Lord is a God of justice; blessed are all those who wait for him.

cnv.text: 因此，耶和華必等候要恩待你們； 他必興起來憐憫你們， 因為耶和華是公義的　神。 等候他的，都是有福的。

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华正在等候， 准备施恩给你们， 祂必怜悯你们。 因为耶和华是公义的上帝， 等候祂的人有福了！

csbs.text: 虽然如此，耶和华却等候着要恩待你们； 因此，他会起来怜悯你们， 因为耶和华是公正的神； 所有等候他的，都是蒙福的！
